title: Anthropic brings Claude AI to Microsoft Word so you can chat with your documents
snippet: Anthropic has launched Claude for Word in beta. The new tool is currently only available for for Team and Enterprise subscribers. It allows users to integrate AI into document workflows, and assist them in tasks like editing and legal reviews&nbsp;

title: Anthropic blocks OpenClaw's founder from accessing Claude AI, reverses decision in hours
snippet: Peter Steinberger faced a temporary ban from &nbsp;Claude AI on Friday. However, his account was quickly reinstated the same day

title: Elon Musk's X is finally cracking down on engagement farming with big overhaul to its monetization program
snippet: Elon Musk's X is making changes to its revenue sharing program by promoting original, high-quality content while reducing low-quality posts. X's Product Head, Nikita Bier, confirmed the changes in a post on the platform

title: Pixel users report phones freezing on startup screen after latest Google update, company responds
snippet: After the March 2026 Pixel update, many users report their devices are stuck in bootloop, making them unusable. Google has also responded to the issue saying that it is actively looking for a solution, and recommends contacting Pixel support for help.

title: Mac users, update your ChatGPT app immediately: OpenAI issues urgent security warning
snippet: OpenAI reported a security issue related to third-party library Axios. The company said it found no evidence of compromised user data or altered systems.&nbsp;

title: Vijay Sales Apple Days: Check out top offers on iPhone 17 Pro Max, iPhone 17, iPhone 16 and more
snippet: Vijay Sales has launched its Apple Days sale from April 11 to 16. The e-commerce platform is offering discounts on iPhones and other Apple products.&nbsp;

title: How to edit your comments on Instagram? Check step-by-step guide
snippet: Instagram now allow users to edit comments within 15 minutes of posting. Users can make unlimited edits during this time, but only the text portion can be changed, and an edited label will be visible to others.

title: Why was Claude Mythos really delayed? OpenAI points to Anthropic's massive compute constraints, says report
snippet: OpenAI has claimed that it has a significant advantage over Anthropic due to its early expansion of computing resources. The company also said in a leaked memo that Claude Mythos was delayed due to computing issues.

title: 'The biggest consumer fraud': Telegram CEO claims WhatsApp is secretly reading your private messages
snippet: Telegram's CEO Pavel Durov has criticized WhatsApp's encryption claims, labeling them as ‘biggest consumer fraud in history’. Durov asserted that WhatsApp reads users' messages and shares them, a sentiment echoed by Elon Musk.&nbsp;

title: Delhi draft EV policy offers up to Rs 1 lakh scrapping incentive for e-cars
snippet: The benefit will be available for scrapping of Delhi-registered BS-IV and below cars and will be limited to the first 1,00,000 eligible applicants under the policy. title: Sam Altman recalls resisting Musk for control of OpenAI ahead of April 27 trial
snippet: The OpenAI CEO said he was proud of the steps he took during his tensions with Elon Musk to ensure the company's survival. Those efforts, he said, were central to preserving OpenAI’s independence and enabling its long-term survival as an institution. In 2018, Musk left OpenAI. It was then restructur

title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman issues 'ring of power' warning on AGI
snippet: Sam Altman said the race to develop artificial general intelligence (AGI) is driving intense competition and conflict among AI companies in a bid to seize control, adding that AGI carries significant societal risks and must not be controlled by a small group of companies.

title: Former OpenAI Stargate leaders plan to join Meta Platforms
snippet: Three key players in OpenAI’s massive effort to set up hundreds of billions of dollars’ worth of artificial intelligence data center capacity are joining Meta Platforms. Peter Hoeschele, who played a critical role in OpenAI’s Stargate initiative, is one of the new hires.

title: Enabling agent-first process redesign
snippet: Unlike static, rules-based systems, AI agents can learn, adapt, and optimize processes dynamically. As they interact with data, systems, people, and other agents in real time, AI agents can execute entire workflows autonomously.
